name: @pocketjs/saga
description: GBA interactive-biography DSL: cine's whole cinematic vocabulary (Mode-0 parallax, raster FX, typewriter captions) plus top-down walkable world scenes, NPC/trigger cues, encounter meters and a Breakout set piece — one TypeScript source, one flashcart-ready ROM.

scripts.build: bun compiler/cli.ts build game/reality-distortion.ts --out dist/reality-distortion.gba --title REALDISTORT
scripts.smoke: bun test/gen-placeholder-art.ts && bun compiler/cli.ts build test/smoke-film.ts --out dist/smoke.gba --title SAGASMOKE
